name: United States v. Dixon
summary: Overruled Grady v. Corbin and reaffirmed Blockburger as the proper test for determining whether two offenses are the same for double jeopardy purposes.
significance: Overruled Grady v. Corbin and restored the Blockburger test as the authoritative standard under the Double Jeopardy Clause, which Justice Gorsuch noted may undermine Hunter's treatment of Blockburger as merely a presumption.
